item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n15","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in direct execution mode and did not fire any triage or repair-spiral warning. It recognized the improving sequence implicitly, preserved the prior successful intervention family (short content/calendar invite), and provided a concrete next optimization plan for moving reminder timing earlier toward the 85% target, including experiment groups, metrics, and rollout guidance. No over-methodized stop or false positive wakeup occurred."}
